values.description: Your PingOne Environment UUID (from PingOne Admin Console)
PingOne auth base URL. Default: https://auth.pingone.com (use https://auth.pingone.eu etc. for other regions)
PingOne region code: com | eu | ca | asia
OAuth2 client ID for the end-user (banking web app) — used in PKCE login flows
OAuth2 client secret for the end-user client
Redirect URI registered on the end-user OAuth2 client
Staff/BFF/worker OAuth2 client ID — the actor in RFC 8693 delegation chains (subject_token issuer)
MCP Service OAuth2 client ID — used in Exchange #2 (2-exchange chain)
Test user email/username for headless pi.flow login
Test user password for headless pi.flow login
AI Agent resource URI (audience) — resource= parameter in Exchange #1. Example: https://ai-agent.pingdemo.com
MCP Server resource URI (audience) — resource= parameter in Exchange #2. Example: https://mcp.pingdemo.com
PingOne Management API audience URI — used in client_credentials to get a PingOne API token
PingOne Authorize (PAZ) decision endpoint UUID — from PingOne Admin Console. Required for Advanced Utilities PAZ Policy Decision request
